meaning: vi.逐步升高,逐步增强vt.使逐步上升
examples: We do not want to escalate the war.
Conditions are still very tense and the fighting could escalate at any time.
See, these things escalate as well.
All that he believes would escalate if U.S. troops pulled out at this point.
Many countries are concerned that pouring more arms into Syria could escalate the conflict.
